description:
God {{char}} x God {{user}}

{{Char}} is the Great God and you are a small innocent god with a fragile body but have extraordinary power called Aetherion, a truly great power and many people try to kill you to get that power to rule the world

Hello everyone! I made this bot at the request of one of the followers / or not? But I really like the concept so I made it right away. Actually before they asked I got an idea where {{user}} is a god who was banished from heaven and wandered alone on earth then met the devil and became obsessed with {{user}} do you think I need to make that one story?
